steps.title: Read the simile
steps.content: The underlined phrase compares the standing columns to ancient trees in a petrified forest. This image helps the reader picture the columns as tall, spindly, old, and still upright among the ruins.

steps.title: Match image to purpose
steps.content: Choice B adds knowledge about the city that the phrase does not show. Choice C mistakes the comparison for an expected forest visit. Choice D invents a specific historical date. The phrase visually illustrates one part of the ruins. The answer is A.
